## Services — Full Descriptions

### Maid Services
Professional residential maid services for homes throughout Hayes, VA and surrounding Virginia
communities. Each visit covers kitchens (countertops, sink, exterior appliances, stovetop),
all bathrooms (toilet, tub/shower, vanity, mirrors), bedrooms (dusting, vacuuming, surfaces),
living areas (vacuuming, mopping, dusting), and baseboards throughout. The same crew handles
recurring visits so they learn each client's home and preferences. Eco-friendly product options
are available. This is Keep N Kleen's core residential service.

### Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning
Comprehensive property turnover cleaning for renters, homeowners, landlords, and property
managers in Hayes, VA and across Virginia. A move-out clean covers areas that standard
maintenance cleaning doesn't: inside all appliances (oven, refrigerator, microwave), inside
all kitchen and bathroom cabinets, window sills and tracks, baseboards on all surfaces, light
fixtures, and all floor surfaces including inside closets. Thorough enough to help recover a
full security deposit. Move-in cleans prepare a property for new occupants — a genuine fresh
start. Scheduling within 2–5 business days of property handoff.

### Regular Home Cleaning
Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly recurring home cleaning plans for Virginia homeowners. The same
crew handles every visit with the same checklist — consistency is the core of the service.
Bi-weekly is the most popular frequency and suits most single-family homes. Weekly is ideal
for busy households, families with children, or homes with pets. Monthly works well for
smaller spaces that need a reliable thorough clean on a predictable schedule. Clients can
customize priorities and areas before their first visit.

### Post-Construction Cleaning
Specialized cleanup after new construction and renovation projects in Hayes, VA and across
Virginia. Construction sites generate drywall dust, adhesive residue, paint overspray, debris,
and fine particulates that require commercial-grade equipment and trained protocols. Keep N Kleen
handles the final-stage cleanup for residential new builds, kitchen and bathroom renovations,
room additions, and commercial construction. Scheduling typically available within 2–5 business
days of construction completion. The space is left ready for occupancy or client walkthrough.

### Deep Home Cleaning
A comprehensive top-to-bottom clean that goes beyond routine maintenance — inside appliances,
behind furniture, inside cabinets, and detail-level scrubbing throughout. Often used as a
first clean before transitioning to regular maid service, or as a standalone seasonal refresh.

### Commercial & Janitorial Services
Professional cleaning for offices, retail spaces, medical facilities, educational institutions,
warehouses, and other commercial properties throughout Virginia. Custom cleaning schedules and
service packages tailored to facility size, type, and budget. Available on recurring contracts
or as-needed service.

## FAQ

Q: What areas do you serve around Hayes, VA?
A: Keep N Kleen serves Hayes and surrounding communities throughout Virginia and North Carolina —
including Gloucester, Yorktown, Newport News, Williamsburg, Poquoson, Hampton, and Mathews —
up to 55 miles from our Hayes, VA home base.

Q: What does a maid service visit include?
A: Every visit covers kitchens (countertops, sink, exterior appliances, stovetop), all bathrooms
(toilet, tub/shower, vanity, mirrors), bedrooms (dusting, vacuuming, surfaces), living areas
(vacuuming, mopping, dusting), and baseboards throughout. We follow a consistent checklist so
nothing gets skipped.

Q: What does a move-out clean cover that regular cleaning doesn't?
A: A move-out clean goes well beyond maintenance cleaning. We clean inside all appliances, inside
kitchen and bathroom cabinets, window sills and tracks, baseboards on all surfaces, light
fixtures, and all floor surfaces including inside closets. It's a top-to-bottom reset.

Q: What frequency of home cleaning is right for me?
A: Weekly is ideal for busy households or homes with children and pets. Bi-weekly suits most
single-family homes and is our most popular plan. Monthly works for smaller households that
want a reliable thorough clean on a set schedule.

Q: Do you use eco-friendly cleaning products?
A: Yes. We offer environmentally responsible cleaning solutions and can use eco-friendly products
upon request. Our team selects products appropriate for your surfaces and any sensitivities in
the space.

Q: How quickly can you start service?
A: Most new clients are scheduled within 3–5 business days of first contact. Contact us for
current availability — we work to accommodate urgent cleaning needs promptly.

Q: Can I customize which rooms or areas get priority?
A: Absolutely. Before your first visit, we discuss your home's layout, your must-clean zones,
and any areas to skip or approach carefully. We document your preferences so every recurring
visit follows the same priorities.

Q: How soon after construction can you clean?
A: We can typically schedule within 2–5 business days of construction completion. Contact us
as soon as your timeline is known and we'll coordinate around the project handoff.

Q: What if I need to adjust my cleaning schedule?
A: We provide flexible service adjustments. Whether you need increased frequency, a temporary
pause, or a schedule change, our team works with you to adapt as your needs change.

Q: Is Keep N Kleen licensed and insured?
A: Yes. Keep N Kleen is fully licensed and insured. Every crew member is background-checked.
You're covered on every visit.

## About the Company
Keep N Kleen was founded in 2021 in Hayes, VA with a straightforward premise: cleaning services
in Virginia weren't meeting the bar that homeowners and business owners actually needed. Crews
would show up inconsistently, rush through rooms, and leave clients wondering whether it was
worth calling back. Keep N Kleen was built to solve that — not with marketing promises, but with
a system that produces consistent results.

Operating out of Hayes, VA and serving communities across Virginia and into North Carolina, the
company has grown entirely through referrals and repeat clients. Every crew is trained on a
structured process, not improvisation. Every visit is held to the same checklist and standard.
The business is licensed and fully insured, and treats access to clients' homes and businesses
with the seriousness that deserves.

After 5 years, the goal is unchanged: every client leaves a visit feeling like they got exactly
what they were promised — and calls back because they did.
